target: 34. Elimination Operation

(The funeral has ended,
and it's just past 6 o'clock…)

(After returning home with Mio,
I made up an excuse to go out)

(Then I rejoined Nagumo-sensei and the others,
and the three of us are now in front of Koba Mart)
(Nagumo-sensei… Are you sure you'll be okay alone?)
Let's go, Ryunosuke.

You're trusting me because of this book, right?
Nagumo-sensei's novel "Swamp Man" is based on real events…!!

The "Swamp Man" in this story
looks exactly like a Shadow,
and the protagonist's name is the same as your real name…!!

In other words, this was written based on an event
you experienced in middle school…
Isn't that right!?

You're right.
I did fictionalize it, and the ending is different…

Fourteen years ago, I…
met a Shadow on this island,
and it killed my family.

The one who saved me then
was Ginjiro Nezu there.

At the same time, I had an experience.
Strictly speaking, that experience is
the reason I trust you.
So, that means…?

I can't tell you.
It's related to my true identity.

If I tell you and you get copied,
the Shadow will find out my true identity.
I can't take that risk.
Shadows target families.

If Hizuru returns to this island,
she'll be targeted by the Shadow…
Family…?

…I see!! So that's why Ushio, Mio,
and even I are being targeted!!

Wait…Hold on.
What about Alan?!
Don't worry.

I already eliminated Alan's Shadow.
I did it during the funeral.
Oh…I see…!!

(All this time…
You've been fighting in secret
without me knowing…!!)
Now Alan's Shadow won't be born again.
W-what!?

Same as with Hashi.
You gain "immunity".
That's what I mean.

If you get the Shadow Sickness
but kill the Shadow you were born with,
you'll never have one again.

S-so…
If you defeat your Shadow once,
you'll never be copied again!?

Ah…
And I have "immunity".

So my Shadow doesn't exist…
You don't have to believe me…
I see…

(Being copied gives you "immunity".
That's useful information.)
But…Nagumo-sensei, you don't have immunity, right?
Then why did you come back to this dangerous island!?

"I came to help you…"
That much is certain.
You might be better off not believing me…
Then, what's your plan?

The deadline is 54 hours left.
Everyone will disappear when the summer festival ends…!!

That four-armed Shadow…
I felt like it was controlling all the Shadows.

If we can figure out the identity of the "Four-armed"
Shadow by 9 a.m. on the 24th,
we can eliminate it…

Eliminate…
That's a good idea!

If we catch and eliminate Shadows one by one,
eventually we'll hit the "main target".

It's simple…
Eliminating pests!!

My stepsister Mio is in danger…!!
Can you help me defeat Mio's Shadow!?

Alright. According to your notes,
Mio will appear in front of the Western Food Kofu at 9 p.m. tonight.
We'll target that spot…
But there's another issue to deal with first.
The Kobayakawa family, right?
You'll fail if we do this blindly…
What!?

I saw it…
On the 24th. In that shrine…Shiori was there!!!

So I failed to bury Shiori…
That's the case, isn't it?

Yes…!!
So let me come with you too!

Shiori killed Ushio!!!
There's no mistake…
She's also my enemy!!!
(And even if we fail again…)

(If I know why we failed,
that would be helpful…)
…Alright.
Hizuru Minakata
But I can go inside alone…
Shinpei Ajiro

Nagumo-sensei, what's wrong?
You seem to be listening to something on your phone…

Ah…
He doesn't have memories from when Hizuru was around.

Eh!?
What do you mean…?

(Is it something about Nagumo-sensei's true identity?
Then I can't ask…)

(For now, I'll just trust you.
I'm counting on you, Nagumo-sensei…!!)
Hizuru Minakata
Understood, older sister.

Ah!
Hizuru!!

I'll be back after dinner…
No, sorry.

Since it's a special occasion,
I'll give you a souvenir.
Eeep!! I don't want that!!
…Please come in.
Then I'll take my leave.

Sorry, Asako…
Can I open this here?
Yeah!

Hey, Hizuru…
Want to have dinner with me?

I have a lot to talk about…
I want to introduce my husband too.

…No.
I'll be leaving right away.

(Alright, I smashed its head…
But the main body is still flat!!)

(Attacking in 3D doesn't deal damage…
But I'm being watched
by the two eyes on its face!!)
(Even if just for a moment, destroying it has meaning!!)

(There are two more Shadows in this house…
Asako's husband Tatsuo and daughter Shiori!)

(If they find out I know how to kill Shadows,
they'll stop approaching me)
(It's best to eliminate them all at once!!)
Shinpei Ajiro

Um…
Could it be…
What?

Nagumo-sensei…
You have a split personality, right?

Split personality?!
…Why would you think that?
It was what Nagumo-sensei muttered at the cannon site!!

"Did you meet your brother?"…
That means…

Hmph…
It's not far off…

Truly…
Are you sure you're okay alone!?

We'll wait here!
Until we get the signal…

If you've seen it,
Ryunosuke has the strength
to fight Shadows…
…Ryunosuke!?
Ah…
He's strong…!!

To be honest…
I don't trust you like Hizuru does…
I don't understand about loops or anything…
Hizuru said…

"If you saw the future,
you weren't at the Kobayakawa house…"

"If you go in,
it might change the reason
Shiori's Shadow escapes…"
"Then we won't be able to make the right plan…"

She's trying to figure out the cause of the failure.
All we can do is wait…!!
…Yes.

Hear me out.
She believed in you.

She's not dying today…
If that's a lie, I won't forgive you…
…Yes…
(Indeed, the teacher was strong…)

(When I defeated Mio at the shrine,
she moved faster than that agile shadow…
That's "Ryunosuke"!!)

Nezu-san…
About this "Ryunosuke"…
Can you tell me?!

Tch…
Well, it's easy to find out…

Hizuru had a twin brother…
That was Ryunosuke.

Fourteen years ago…
His body was found on Mt. Takanosu.

When I heard Hizuru's scream…
I rushed over since I was working nearby.

Ryunosuke was…
In a terrible state.
So… what happened?
He was eaten…

All over his body… there were bite marks.
Everyone said it was wild dogs…

Under police supervision, we did a mountain hunt…
But Hizuru said…
This was "murder"!!
So, what's the evidence?
Among the bite marks… there was a strangulation mark on his neck!!

<color=#GF_TIPS_035>Ryunosuke</color> wasn't devoured.
He was killed first, then eaten…
That was Hizuru's claim.

But the autopsy said "hemorrhagic shock death"…
No one believed Hizuru's story.

There was no chance to investigate further…
The body was burned the same day.

Nezu-san…!
That's related to Ushio…
Ah… you notice, don't you?
Everything might be connected.

From fourteen years ago… no, even earlier…
this island's monsters…
The shadows took our families…
Hizuru Minakata

Dad?
…Mom?

No way…
Why?
Why did you kill me?
(Released!?)

(No, I felt resistance!!
I definitely smashed the shadow with the hammer…)
…Tch!

(He ran away… I was too weak…
Not much damage at the edge…)

(No!! But it's strange…
It should have been a fatal blow…)

(Something's wrong…
That shadow… "Shiori"!!)

(But he definitely ran to the third floor…
Just like my sister said…)
Shinpei Ajiro

I'm determined to eradicate
every single shadow from this island…
With my life.

Do you have the same resolve?
Shinpei…!!

Yes…!!
I want to protect my family…
No matter what it takes!!
I have the resolve!!

Hmph!
I don't trust words…
You talk too much.
You should be quiet…

That's a message from the teacher, right?!
Let me see it too!

"Asako and Tatsuo are eliminated.
Shiori was killed.
Escaped to the third floor"…
"…I'll pursue, but it might go as Shinpei said"…
Tch!

Change to Plan B!
This is our time.
Plan B!!"

Here!
Your nail gun!

Let me see it…
Your resolve, okay?
